# BETextSuggestion

**Class**

A text suggestion to insert into a document.

## Declaration

```swift
class BETextSuggestion
```

## Overview

You typically don’t create instances of `BETextSuggestion`. The system supplies them to your browser text view’s [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInput/insert(_:)-5iryn] method to suggest text insertions, for example AutoFill suggestions.

## Creating a text suggestion

- **init(inputText:)**: Initializes a new text suggestion with the given input text.

## Getting the suggested text

- **inputText**: Text that will be inserted into the document when the user chooses the suggestion.

## Replacements and AutoFill

- **BEAutoFillTextSuggestion**
- **BETextAlternatives**
- **BETextDocumentContext**: Information about the text surrounding a selection in a document.
- **BETextDocumentRequest**
- **BETextDocumentRequest.Options**
- **BETextReplacementOptions**

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- BEAutoFillTextSuggestion

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
